falsification_conditions.condition: The price breaks above the 200-day moving average by more than 5% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A strong bullish trend would contradict the HOLD signal and invalidate the pattern similarity to a previous bottom.

falsification_conditions.condition: The blowoff score increases to 60 or higher within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A blowoff top would directly contradict the current HOLD signal and indicate a reversal in momentum.

falsification_conditions.condition: Trading volume surges to 200% above the 30-day average within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Such extreme volume would indicate a clear market move, invalidating the HOLD signal and suggesting a breakout or breakdown.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
